final:
module up_counter (
    input obf_clk,
    input load,
    input [3:0] load_value,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

    always @(posedge obf_clk) begin
        if (load) begin
            count <= load_value;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
